{{Quote|Hey, Bro. I found just the woman pilot for you. Her handle is Lady Blue and she was last year's Miss Liberty. Can I pick 'em or what?|Emon Azzameen, in an e-mail to Ace Azzameen|<ref name="XWA" />}}
"'''Lady Blue'''" was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] stationed aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] in the months leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. She was considered attractive and held the title of [[Miss Liberty|Miss ''Liberty'']] in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. Lady Blue was set up to go on a date with fellow pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] by Ace's brother [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]], but she was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on a recon mission to the [[Japai system/Legends|Japai system]] before she got the chance. Emon was unable to attend her funeral, and Ace never got to meet her in person, though he kept a picture she sent him in his quarters.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I couldn't make it to Lady Blue's funeral. I'm sorry things turned out this way. She was a great gal. It just goes to show you how unpredictable life is while the Empire exists. It's dangerous out there.|Emon Azzameen, in an e-mail to Ace Azzameen|<ref name="XWA" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Lady Blue joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Alliance Starfighter Corps]]<ref name="XWA" /> at some point prior to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="2ABY">Lady Blue is described as winning the [[Miss Liberty|Miss ''Liberty'']] pageant the year before the events of ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''.</ref> Assigned to the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']], she entered and won the [[Miss Liberty|Miss ''Liberty'']] pageant in 2 ABY and became known by the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] "Lady Blue."<ref name="XWA" /><ref name="2ABY" />

[[File:Ace_and_MK.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Ace Azzameen, with whom Lady Blue arranged a date, before her death]]
Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="XWA" /> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Lady Blue met the Alliance-allied pilot [[Emon Azzameen]], whose [[Azzameen family|family]] had sought refuge with the Rebels after being declared traitors to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Azzameen told her about his younger brother, [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]], who was also serving as a starfighter pilot aboard the ''Liberty'', and she decided that she would like to meet the young pilot. Lady Blue sent an [[e-mail]] to Ace, asking if he would be interested in a date and saying that she would contact him to arrange a time after returning from a recon mission to the [[Japai system/Legends|Japai system]]. She also sent him a picture of herself.<ref name="XWA" />

However, Lady Blue was [[Death/Legends|killed]] near the Japai [[Star system/Legends|system]], along with her fellow pilots [[Tabba]] and [[Kraigg]], before she had the chance to meet Ace in person. A funeral service was held for all three pilots aboard the Mon Calamari Star Cruiser [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] shortly after their deaths. Emon later sent an e-mail to his brother apologizing for not being able to attend the funeral and for how the situation had turned out. Ace kept the picture Lady Blue sent him of her on the wall of his room aboard his personal [[YT-2000 light freighter/Legends|YT-2000 light freighter]], the ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]''.<ref name="XWA" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I rarely date other pilots, but from what Emon had told me, you might be the exception. Does getting together sound good to you?|Lady Blue, in an e-mail to Ace Azzameen|<ref name="XWA" />}}
Lady Blue had light skin and [[Color/Legends|blonde]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. She was considered attractive and was chosen as Miss ''Liberty''<ref name="XWA" /> in 2 ABY.<ref name="2ABY" /> Emon Azzameen felt that she would be a good match for his brother, Ace, and attempted to set the two up for a date. Though she generally refrained from dating her fellow pilots, Emon's description of Ace interested her, and she decided to make him an exception and ask the other pilot out.<ref name="XWA" />

==Equipment==
Lady Blue wore the standard [[Rebel flight suit]].<ref name="XWA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lady Blue was created for the [[1999]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'', in which she is the subject of a series of e-mails to the player character, Ace Azzameen, as the two attempt to arrange a date. An e-mail from Emon to Ace Azzameen regarding Lady Blue comes before the Battle 3 mission, "Supply Rebels with Warheads." At the same time, a picture of Lady Blue appears in Ace's room. If the player zooms in on this image, a caption underneath mentions that she was killed before meeting Ace. However, Lady Blue goes on to e-mail Ace after the mission, and an e-mail announcing her death and funeral arrangements does not appear until after the mission "Recon Imperial Research Center."<ref name="XWA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
